summary: Local React + TypeScript + Vite MVP job-search app with MSW-backed mock data, React Router routes, demo auth, and a protected dashboard shell. Build works, but exact runtime verification and Playwright proof-of-life are not yet fully stable.

working: React Query global provider is active
MSW is wired into app startup
Jobs list route fetches mock data
Job detail route fetches a single mock job
partial: Local dev runtime has worked but is affected by port contention
Preview runtime has worked but exact verification has not stayed clean
Playwright config and smoke test exist but proof is incomplete
broken: Playwright smoke verification is not cleanly passing
unverified: Automated browser proof of click-through from jobs list to detail

features.name: Jobs list
features.description: Fetches and renders job links from MSW mock API data.

features.name: Job detail
features.description: Fetches and renders a single mock job by ID.

features.name: Company route
features.description: Renders a simple company slug page.

features.name: Demo auth
features.description: Uses demo_auth in localStorage to gate protected routes.

features.name: Protected dashboard
features.description: Redirects signed-out users to sign-in and renders placeholder dashboard content when signed in.

features.name: Playwright smoke test
features.description: Config and test file exist, but clean pass is not established.

key_files.why: Defines scripts, dependencies, and test commands.
Defines runtime and preview port configuration.
Bootstraps MSW and the React Query provider.
Contains active routes and UI logic.
Smoke test for the Jobs page.
Defines local, git, and Drive alignment rules.

last_verified: Playwright smoke test file exists but passing proof is incomplete

blockers: Port contention on 5173 and 4173 has caused unstable verification
Playwright smoke verification is not yet cleanly passing
Exact end-to-end locked-port MVP proof remains incomplete
next_steps: Stabilize dev startup on port 5173 with no conflicting process
Stabilize preview startup on port 4173 with no conflicting process
Re-run and fix Playwright smoke until it passes cleanly
Confirm browser click-through from jobs list to job detail
Expand mock fixture and UI from markdown-guided logic for jobs, recruiters, and related tracking entities
